india_trends.title: ECB filings halve to USD 5.43 billion in March: RBI
india_trends.summary: Indian companies and lenders saw foreign borrowing filings drop significantly in March. This reduction occurred amidst global financial market uncertainties. india_trends.title: Tata Motors PV bets on SUV, EV demand to drive ‘industry-beating’ growth in FY27 despite geopolitical risks
india_trends.summary: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles anticipates significant growth in FY27. Strong demand for SUVs, CNG, and electric vehicles will drive production increases. The company aims for industry-beating performance. Potential challenges from global events and commodity prices are being monitored. This follows

india_trends.title: Broker’s call: CarTrade (Buy)
US stock market today: S&P 500, Dow futures gain up to 0.8% as AI rally regains momentum; Cisco jumps 17%
india_trends.summary: US stock futures were positive, driven by technology stocks, with the Nasdaq 100 up 0.7%. Cisco's strong earnings further boosted market sentiment. Traders are also watching inflation trends and geopolitical developments, especially regarding US-China relations and Middle East tensions.

india_trends.title: Quote of the day by Lou Simpson: "Attempting to guess short-term swings in individual stocks, the stock market or the economy is not likely to produce consistently good results. Short-term developments are too unpredictable."
india_trends.summary: Legendary investor Lou Simpson emphasised that predicting short-term market swings is unlikely to yield consistent results due to inherent unpredictability. Focusing on long-term business fundamentals and patience allows for compounding wealth, rather than succumbing to emotional reactions driven by

india_trends.title: Railway Board pulls up zones over poor pace of environmental initiatives, orders fast-track efforts
india_trends.summary: Indian Railways is pushing for faster execution of environmental projects. The Railway Board has urged all zones to complete these initiatives effectively and on time. This is crucial for achieving the goal of becoming a Net Zero Carbon Emitter by 2030. A significant fund was allocated last year, bu

india_trends.title: RBI cancels registrations of 150 NBFCs; around 67 firms from Delhi, 75 from West Bengal
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has cancelled the registration of 150 Non-Banking Financial Companies. The highest number of affected firms are registered in Delhi and West Bengal. These companies can no longer conduct financial business. This action impacts lending, leasing, and investment activities. Th

india_trends.title: Tata Motors PV posts resilient Q4 but JLR drags full-year numbers; stock closes marginally higher
india_trends.summary: For the full year FY26, consolidated revenue declined 8.3 per cent to ₹3,35,582 crore

india_trends.title: M&M fully exits CIE Automotive, accelerates shift to core investments
india_trends.summary: Mahindra and Mahindra has sold its entire 3.58% stake in CIE Automotive for €126 million, continuing its strategy to exit non-core investments. The sale aligns with its plan to focus on profitable sectors like automobiles and aerospace.

india_trends.title: ​Gainers & Losers: NLC India, MCX and Kaynes Technology among 6 big movers on Thursday ​
india_trends.summary: ​Domestic equities rallied for a second day on Thursday, with banks, metals and pharma powering gains even as IT lagged, while several major stocks saw sharp moves on earnings and announcements.​

india_trends.title: Could a tax break on bond investments be the move that strengthens the Rupee? Ashvin Parekh answers
india_trends.summary: India is considering reducing taxes on foreign investments in its bonds to attract long-term capital and stabilize the rupee. This move aims to offset currency risk concerns that have deterred foreign investors, particularly from the bond market, following withdrawals from equities. The policy's suc

india_trends.title: Adani Airport Holdings signs deal with IHG Hotels & Resorts for 5 properties
india_trends.summary: Adani Airport Holdings is partnering with IHG Hotels & Resorts to build five new hotels. These hotels will be located in important cities like Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Mangaluru, and Thiruvananthapuram. This collaboration will add nearly 1,500 hotel rooms. It also marks the debut

india_trends.title: Singapore Airlines annual profit falls 57pc on Air India loss, absence of prior-year accounting gain
india_trends.summary: Singapore Airlines Group saw a 57.4% profit drop to SGD 1.184 billion in FY26, largely due to no prior one-off merger gain and Air India's losses. Despite this, SIA remains committed to its Air India investment, viewing it as crucial for its multi-hub strategy in a growing aviation market.

india_trends.title: Muthoot Finance Q4 Results: Profit surges 135% YoY to ₹3,397 crore; revenue jumps 65%
india_trends.summary: Muthoot Finance's profit for Q4FY26 came in at ₹3,397 crore, up 135% year-on-year (YoY), compared with ₹1,444 crore posted in the same period a year ago.

india_trends.title: Air India posts annual loss of $2.8 billion, Singapore Air results show
india_trends.summary: Air India's losses amounted to 3.56 ‌billion Singapore dollars, the ​annual ​report ⁠showed, which at current exchange rates ​was $2.8 billion.

india_trends.title: IHG to bring Kimpton to India through Adani Airports partnership with Jaipur hotel
india_trends.summary: IHG Hotels, the company behind InterContinental, Six Senses and Crowne Plaza, has partnered with Adani Airport Holdings to develop 1,500 hotel rooms, including its first Kimpton hotel in India.

india_trends.title: Sensex, Nifty rally for second straight day as US-China optimism offsets rupee woes
india_trends.summary: Nifty closes at 23,689, up 277 points or 1.18%, while Sensex gains 789 points or 1.06% to settle at 75,398
